subject: A heist scene: three figures near a large metal vault door, two incapacitated by thick green gas, while one stands upright with a face covering directing or surveying the scene
description: A wide scene set inside what appears to be a bank vault or secure room. A large circular metal vault door dominates the left background. Thick green smoke or gas floods the lower half of the composition. Three figures are visible: in the center-foreground, a figure crouches low, coughing or incapacitated; to the right, a second figure also appears affected and raises a hand defensively; standing upright in the middle-background, a third figure has a purple bandana or scarf covering the lower face and gestures broadly with one arm. The standing figure appears to be the one who deployed the gas — an infiltrator in control of the scene. The color palette contrasts cool grey-green gas against warm interiors.
foreground: two figures incapacitated by green gas, crouching or stumbling
background: circular metal vault door, third standing figure with purple face covering
emotion: chaos for two; control for one — the masked figure calm amid incapacitated guards
